summary: NGAP-edge observe confirms that registration is blocked by a real Open5GS rejection on the declared lane.
suggested_next: capture artifacts for the registration rejection
compare subscriber and NGAP identity against the declared core profile
retry only after the core-side mismatch is explained

checks.detail: real Open5GS rejected the registration attempt after initial UE access

checks.detail: downlink nas transport carried the rejection toward the UE lane
